title: ilex megaphylla
intro: Ilex megaphylla, also known as the Japanese holly, is a species of holly native to Japan and parts of eastern Asia, characterized by its glossy leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex megaphylla include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ilex megaphylla typically involve drying the leaves and berries to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
